title: Out of sync, on purpose: desktop design after mobile won
key_points: Examines designing for Spotify's desktop app, the original Spotify experience, and how it continues to evolve alongside mobile rather than simply mirroring it.
Argues for interpreting features per platform rather than copying them 1:1, tailoring execution to desktop's particular strengths.
Frames desktop's distinct role in people's routines as a companion for deep focus, creation, and immersive listening.
Shows, through real examples, how a small, deliberate team being a little 'out of sync' with mobile can turn consistency into craft.
